qa_pair.question: Load the stage at /home/sal-garfield/.local/share/ov/pkg/aodt-1.4.1/kit/exts/omni.kit.widget.stage/data/tests/4Lights.usda then call find_prims with type_filter set to 'SphereLight'. How many prims are returned?

Load the stage at /home/sal-garfield/.local/share/ov/pkg/aodt-1.4.1/kit/exts/omni.kit.widget.stage/data/tests/4Lights.usda then get the 'intensity' attribute of the prim at /Stage/SphereLight_01. What is the numeric value of the intensity?
Load the stage at /home/sal-garfield/.local/share/ov/pkg/aodt-1.4.1/kit/exts/omni.kit.widget.stage/data/tests/usd/cube.usda then call get_stage_info. What letter is reported as the Up Axis?

Load the stage at /home/sal-garfield/.local/share/ov/pkg/aodt-1.4.1/kit/exts/omni.kit.widget.stage/data/tests/usd/cube.usda then call get_prim_info on the prim at /World/Cube. What USD type name is reported for that prim?

Load the stage at /home/sal-garfield/.local/share/ov/pkg/aodt-1.4.1/kit/exts/omni.kit.widget.stage/data/tests/usd/cube.usda then get the 'size' attribute of the prim at /World/Cube. What is the numeric value of the size?

Load the stage at /home/sal-garfield/.local/share/ov/pkg/aodt-1.4.1/kit/exts/omni.kit.widget.stage/data/tests/4Lights.usda then call get_prim_info on the prim at /Stage/Cube. What USD type name is reported for that prim?

Load the stage at /home/sal-garfield/.local/share/ov/pkg/aodt-1.4.1/kit/exts/omni.kit.widget.stage/data/tests/usd/cube.usda then call get_stage_info. What integer is reported as the Total Prims count?

Load the stage at /home/sal-garfield/.local/share/ov/pkg/aodt-1.4.1/kit/exts/omni.kit.widget.stage/data/tests/usd/cube.usda then call get_prim_transform on /World/Cube. What is the local X translation value, rounded to the nearest integer?

Load the stage at /home/sal-garfield/.local/share/ov/pkg/aodt-1.4.1/kit/exts/omni.kit.widget.stage/data/tests/usd/cube.usda then create a new prim at /World/TestSphere with type Sphere. After creation, call get_prim_info on /World/TestSphere. What USD type name is reported?

Load the stage at /home/sal-garfield/.local/share/ov/pkg/aodt-1.4.1/kit/exts/omni.kit.widget.stage/data/tests/usd/cube.usda then call get_simulation_status without starting the simulation. What single word is reported as the simulation State?
